meta.title: Insights on the Upcoming National Security Strategy from Michael R. Pompeo and Nadia Schadlow
meta.description:
Join Hudson Institute Senior Fellow and former Deputy National Security Advisor for Strategy Nadia Schadlow for a discussion with Hudson Distinguished Fellow and former Secretary of State Michael R. Pompeo on the Biden administration’s forthcoming National Security Strategy. Secretary Pompeo and Dr. Schadlow will be share insights on what is needed from the Strategy to advance American interests and counter key threats. Please join Hudson Institute for this timely discussion.

Watch on Hudson.org: https://www.hudson.org/events/2093-virtual-event-insights-on-the-upcoming-national-security-strategy-from-michael-r-pompeo-and-nadia-schadlow-32022
